function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get weather of an location, the user shoud supply a location first

location.description: The city and state, e.g. San Francisco, CA

function.name: pose_detect
function.description: Analyses an image captured from an extarnal camera and checks whether or not the pacient is doing the specified exercise correctly

index.description: The numerical value for each sequence. 0 is for when the user wants to check if he raised his shoulders right and 1 is for when he wants to check if he raised his elbows correctly

function.name: shoulder_flexion
function.description: Kinetotherapy exercise: raises the arm forward and up, then lowers it back. Used to improve shoulder range of motion. Can target one or both arms.

hold.description: Seconds to hold the arm at the top of each repetition.

arm.description: Which arm to exercise. Defaults to both.

function.name: shoulder_abduction
function.description: Kinetotherapy exercise: lifts the arm sideways away from the body, then returns it. Used to improve shoulder mobility. Can target one or both arms.

hold.description: Seconds to hold the arm at the outer position of each repetition.

arm.description: Which arm to exercise. Defaults to both.

function.name: elbow_flexion
function.description: Kinetotherapy exercise: bends and straightens the elbow. Used to improve elbow range of motion. Can target one or both arms.

hold.description: Seconds to hold the elbow bent at each repetition.

arm.description: Which arm to exercise. Defaults to both.

function.name: forearm_rotation
function.description: Kinetotherapy exercise: rotates the forearm back and forth (pronation and supination), like turning a doorknob. Used to improve forearm mobility. Can target one or both arms.

hold.description: Seconds to hold the forearm at each rotation extreme.

arm.description: Which arm to exercise. Defaults to both.

function.name: physio_routine
function.description: Runs the full kinetotherapy routine: shoulder flexion, shoulder abduction, elbow flexion, and forearm rotation in sequence. Returns the robot to home and releases servos at the end.

number_of_reps.description: Number of repetitions per exercise. Capped at 3 internally.

arm.description: Which arm to exercise throughout the routine. Defaults to both.

function.name: wave_hello
function.description: Wave hello using the left arm. A friendly greeting gesture.

waves.description: How many full oscillations of the wave to perform.

speed.description: Seconds per half-swing of the wave. Lower is faster.

function.name: home
function.description: Smoothly returns all joints to their home (resting) position.

duration.description: Seconds for the full move to home.

function.name: release
function.description: Cuts power to all servos. The arms go limp and stop drawing current. Use when finished with all movements or as an emergency stop.

function.name: set_motor_speed
function.description: Controls the DC motors of the robot's base/wheels via the ESP32. Use this to make the robot move forward, slow down, or stop. Value is clamped 0-210. Use this when the user asks the robot to move, go forward, stop, or change speed.

speed_value.description: Motor speed. 0 stops the motors completely. 210 is maximum speed. Guidance: 0 = stop, 50-80 = slow, 120-150 = medium, 180-210 = fast.
